title: ECG: hypothermia
body_html:
The following ECG changes may be seen in hypothermia
  • bradycardia
  • 'J' wave - small hump at the end of the QRS complex
  • first degree heart block
  • long QT interval
  • atrial and ventricular arrhythmias
2
2
